title: BRAVE COIN MOMENT — Eva fills with quiet pride
prompt: Medium shot in @dentist-waiting — sea-themed waiting room. @Eva on the LEFT stands center-frame, tiny and proud, both hands cupped open in front of her. From off-screen at the edge of frame, a single soft cartoon-mitten-style gloved hand presents a shiny gold @dental-coin into Eva's palms. A white @dentist-goodie-bag rests on the bench beside her. @Sara on the RIGHT stands beside Eva, her own face beaming with sister-pride. Off-screen kindly female voice (the doctor, only audio): "This is for the BRAVEST first-timer I've seen all WEEK." Eva (looking down at the coin in her palms, eyes filling): "I... I did it." Sara (proud whisper, putting an arm around Eva): "Welcome to the Brave Tooth Club, sis." Eva clutches the coin to her chest, a single happy tear slipping down her cheek.
